description_long: This is a dark wooden shelving unit with a trapezoidal profile, featuring four evenly spaced horizontal shelves. The wood grain is visible across all surfaces, giving it a rich, natural appearance. The front is open, allowing easy access to the shelves, while the sides are solid and taper slightly inward from bottom to top. The back panel is flat and unadorned, matching the dark wood finish of the rest of the structure. There are no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design. This type of shelving is suitable for storing books, decorative items, or supplies in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces.
description: A dark wood, open-front shelving unit with four shelves and a trapezoidal, minimalist design. The solid sides and back emphasize its sturdy, functional character.
description_view_0: The front view shows four open shelves with a dark wood grain and a slightly tapered profile.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the trapezoidal shape, with the sides angling inward from bottom to top.
description_view_2: The back view displays a flat, solid wood panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the same inward taper and solid construction.
